title: goeppertia lanata
intro: Goeppertia lanata, also known as the Wooly Calathea or Wooly Pinstripe Calathea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Marantaceae, characterized by its striking, woolly foliage with distinctive pinstripe patterns. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Goeppertia lanata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Goeppertia lanata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal supplements or tinctures.
